summary.es: NATO ha lanzado su primera respuesta coordinada ante sospechas de sabotaje en un cable submarino en el Mar Báltico, afectando infraestructura crítica. No se amplían detalles sobre la sabotaje o acciones subsecuentes.

title.original: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
title.en: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
title.zh: 卢旺达支持的反叛武装进入刚果避难城市
title.es: Rebeldes respaldados por Ruanda entran en ciudad santuario del Congo

summary.original: According to the Wall Street Journal article, residents of the Congolese city of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels backed by Rwanda overran Congolese troops. United Nations officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were present inside the city, which serves as a safe haven and aid hub. This information is based on the article's details about recent conflict developments and population displacement in Goma.
summary.en: According to the Wall Street Journal article, residents of the Congolese city of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels backed by Rwanda overran Congolese troops. United Nations officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were present inside the city, which serves as a safe haven and aid hub. This information is based on the article's details about recent conflict developments and population displacement in Goma.
summary.zh: 刚果市民报告称，卢旺达支持的反叛武装击溃刚果军队后发生枪击和炮击。联合国估计该避难城市内有超过一百万流离失所者，该市亦为援助中心。
summary.es: Residentes de Goma reportaron disparos y bombardeos tras la llegada de rebeldes respaldados por Ruanda que superaron a las tropas congoleñas. La ONU estima más de un millón de desplazados en esta ciudad santuario y centro de ayuda.

title.original: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
title.en: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
title.zh: 瑞士法郎、日元走强，DeepSeek新闻推动避险货币
title.es: Franco suizo y yen japonés suben mientras DeepSeek impulsa refugios seguros

summary.original: The Wall Street Journal reports that the Swiss franc and Japanese yen strengthened against the U.S. dollar as investors sought safe-haven currencies. This movement came after the launch of a new AI model by Chinese startup DeepSeek, which affected U.S. technology stocks. The episode title and existing summary suggest a connection between AI developments and shifts in currency markets.
summary.en: The Wall Street Journal reports that the Swiss franc and Japanese yen strengthened against the U.S. dollar as investors sought safe-haven currencies. This movement came after the launch of a new AI model by Chinese startup DeepSeek, which affected U.S. technology stocks. The episode title and existing summary suggest a connection between AI developments and shifts in currency markets.
summary.zh: 据华尔街日报报道，瑞郎和日元兑美元走强，因投资者寻求避险货币。此举源于中国初创企业DeepSeek发布AI新模型，影响美国科技股。
summary.es: El Wall Street Journal informa que el franco suizo y el yen japonés se fortalecieron frente al dólar debido a que inversores buscan monedas refugio tras el lanzamiento de un modelo de IA de la startup china DeepSeek, que afectó a las acciones tecnológicas de EE.UU.

title.original: Cocaine-Funded Gangs Shake Colombia Years After Peace Pact
title.en: Cocaine-Funded Gangs Shake Colombia Years After Peace Pact
title.zh: 可卡因资助的帮派震撼哥伦比亚协议签订多年后
title.es: Bandas financiadas por cocaína sacuden Colombia años después del pacto de paz

summary.original: A Wall Street Journal World article describes ongoing attacks by cocaine-funded militias against civilians in Colombia. These events occur eight years after a peace accord removed a powerful rebel group from the area. The article suggests that these attacks reflect the Colombian state's inaction since the peace pact. This summary is based directly on the article's description without additional inference.
summary.en: A Wall Street Journal World article describes ongoing attacks by cocaine-funded militias against civilians in Colombia. These events occur eight years after a peace accord removed a powerful rebel group from the area. The article suggests that these attacks reflect the Colombian state's inaction since the peace pact. This summary is based directly on the article's description without additional inference.
summary.zh: 华尔街日报世界报道描述哥伦比亚遭受由可卡因资助的民兵持续攻击。这些事件发生在和平协议解除一强大反叛组织后八年，反映出政府未采取有效行动。
summary.es: Un artículo del Wall Street Journal describe ataques continuos de milicias financiadas por cocaína contra civiles en Colombia, ocho años tras un acuerdo de paz que eliminó a un grupo rebelde fuerte, mostrando la inacción estatal.

sections.description: AI research, products, and infrastructure signals.

summary.es: Las discusiones de financiamiento reflejan el interés de inversores en aplicar IA para lograr avances en las ciencias de la vida.

title.original: swyx · @swyx · AI/DX researcher · Latent Space
title.en: swyx · @swyx · AI/DX researcher · Latent Space
title.zh: swyx · @swyx · AI/DX研究员 · 潜在空间
title.es: swyx · @swyx · Investigador AI/DX · Espacio Latente

summary.original: swyx shared his current model orchestration stack for serious projects: Sol Ultra for planning, Fable 5 for critique, Sonnet 5 / Terra Ultra / SWE 1.7 for the implementation ("ultracode/slop cannon"), and Devin for final code review. This is one of the clearest public snapshots of how a seasoned AI practitioner treats planning, critique, generation, and review as distinct model-specialized stages — a concrete multi-model workflow that goes well beyond "just use the best model for everything." swyx分享了他当前正式项目的模型编排配置…
summary.en: swyx shared his current model orchestration stack for serious projects: Sol Ultra for planning, Fable 5 for critique, Sonnet 5 / Terra Ultra / SWE 1.7 for the implementation ("ultracode/slop cannon"), and Devin for final code review. This is one of the clearest public snapshots of how a seasoned AI practitioner treats planning, critique, generation, and review as distinct model-specialized stages — a concrete multi-model workflow that goes well beyond "just use the best model for everything." swyx分享了他当前正式项目的模型编排配置…
summary.zh: swyx分享了他用于正式项目的模型编排栈，包括Sol Ultra用于规划，Fable 5用于批评，Sonnet 5 / Terra Ultra / SWE 1.7用于实现（"ultracode/slop cannon"），Devin用于最终代码审核，体现了多模型协同的工作流程。
summary.es: swyx compartió su pila de orquestación de modelos para proyectos serios: Sol Ultra para planificación, Fable 5 para crítica, Sonnet 5 / Terra Ultra / SWE 1.7 para implementación ("ultracode/slop cannon"), y Devin para revisión final de código, mostrando un flujo de trabajo multi-modelo concreto.

title.original: Thibault Sottiaux · @thsottiaux · Codex & ChatGPT, OpenAI
title.en: Thibault Sottiaux · @thsottiaux · Codex & ChatGPT, OpenAI

summary.original: Sottiaux, a product manager on Codex and ChatGPT at OpenAI, dropped a strong milestone signal: "Tomorrow might be 8M active user celebration day. Just saying." In the same window, a companion post announced "ChatGPT Work presents" — suggesting a product reveal tied to the user milestone. If 8M represents active users for a work-focused tier, it would be a significant enterprise adoption signal and suggests OpenAI's work-product line is scaling faster than the broader AI-adoption curve. OpenAI负责Codex和ChatGPT的产品经理So…
summary.en: Sottiaux, a product manager on Codex and ChatGPT at OpenAI, dropped a strong milestone signal: "Tomorrow might be 8M active user celebration day. Just saying." In the same window, a companion post announced "ChatGPT Work presents" — suggesting a product reveal tied to the user milestone. If 8M represents active users for a work-focused tier, it would be a significant enterprise adoption signal and suggests OpenAI's work-product line is scaling faster than the broader AI-adoption curve. OpenAI负责Codex和ChatGPT的产品经理So…

summary.es: Sottiaux, gestor de producto de Codex y ChatGPT en OpenAI, señaló un posible día de celebración por 8M de usuarios activos, junto con un anuncio de "ChatGPT Work presents", sugiriendo un lanzamiento de producto ligado a este hito y un rápido crecimiento en adopción empresarial.

title.original: Thariq · @trq212 · Claude Code, Anthropic
title.en: Thariq · @trq212 · Claude Code, Anthropic
title.zh: Thariq · @trq212 · Claude Code，Anthropic
title.es: Thariq · @trq212 · Claude Code, Anthropic

summary.original: A meaningful Artifacts upgrade shipped from the Claude Code team. Thariq described the core change: Artifacts are now more composable and expressive, and one of his personal showcases is a live project dashboard built in "Claude Tag" — editable by external collaborators or directly by a local Claude Code instance. This points toward Artifacts evolving from static code outputs into lightweight, AI-editable shared workspaces, narrowing the gap between an AI-generated artifact and a live collaborative document. Claud…
summary.en: A meaningful Artifacts upgrade shipped from the Claude Code team. Thariq described the core change: Artifacts are now more composable and expressive, and one of his personal showcases is a live project dashboard built in "Claude Tag" — editable by external collaborators or directly by a local Claude Code instance. This points toward Artifacts evolving from static code outputs into lightweight, AI-editable shared workspaces, narrowing the gap between an AI-generated artifact and a live collaborative document. Claud…
summary.zh: Claude Code团队发布了一项重要的Artifacts升级。Thariq介绍了核心变化：Artifacts 现在更具组合性和表现力，他的个人示例是一个用“Claude Tag”构建的实时项目仪表板——支持外部协作者或本地Claude Code实例直接编辑。此升级使Artifacts从静态代码输出演变为轻量级、AI可编辑的共享工作空间，缩小了AI生成产物和实时协作文档之间的差距。
summary.es: El equipo de Claude Code lanzó una actualización significativa de Artifacts. Thariq describió el cambio central: Artifacts ahora son más composables y expresivos; uno de sus ejemplos personales es un tablero de proyecto en vivo construido con "Claude Tag", editable por colaboradores externos o directamente por una instancia local de Claude Code. Esto apunta a que Artifacts evolucionen de salidas de código estático a espacios de trabajo ligeros, editables por IA y compartidos, cerrando la brecha entre un artefacto generado por IA y un documento colaborativo en vivo.

title.original: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO, Replit
title.en: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO, Replit
title.zh: Amjad Masad · @amasad · Replit首席执行官
title.es: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO de Replit

summary.original: Masad wrote: "Getting realtime progress updates on my model training runs. This feels like early vibe coding except it's making personal models." The parallel is apt — vibe coding abstracted implementation complexity so non-experts could ship software; the next frontier appears to be vibe training: iterating on personal or domain-specific models with real-time feedback, without needing to understand the full training stack. Replit is clearly positioning itself as the primary platform for this new modality. Masad写道…
summary.en: Masad wrote: "Getting realtime progress updates on my model training runs. This feels like early vibe coding except it's making personal models." The parallel is apt — vibe coding abstracted implementation complexity so non-experts could ship software; the next frontier appears to be vibe training: iterating on personal or domain-specific models with real-time feedback, without needing to understand the full training stack. Replit is clearly positioning itself as the primary platform for this new modality. Masad写道…
summary.zh: Masad写道：“实时获取我的模型训练进度更新。这感觉像早期的vibe编码，只不过现在是制作个人模型。”这比喻恰当——vibe编码简化了实现复杂度，使非专家也能发布软件；下一前沿似乎是vibe训练：通过实时反馈迭代个人或特定领域模型，无需全面了解训练堆栈。Replit显然正定位自身为此新模式的主要平台。
summary.es: Masad escribió: "Recibir actualizaciones de progreso en tiempo real durante mis ejecuciones de entrenamiento de modelos. Se siente como la codificación vibe temprana, pero ahora creando modelos personales." La analogía es acertada: la codificación vibe abstrajo la complejidad para que no expertos pudieran lanzar software; la próxima frontera parece ser el entrenamiento vibe: iterar sobre modelos personales o específicos con retroalimentación en tiempo real, sin necesidad de entender todo el stack de entrenamiento. Replit se posiciona claramente como la plataforma principal para esta nueva modalidad.

title.original: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · CEO, Vercel
title.en: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · CEO, Vercel
title.zh: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · Vercel首席执行官
title.es: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · CEO de Vercel

summary.original: Rauch shared a striking quantitative signal: "Open-weight models ran 29% of gateway tokens, up from 11% in April." In roughly three months, open-weight models nearly tripled their share of inference traffic on the v0 / Vercel AI Gateway — the most concrete real-world data point corroborating today's Nemotron podcast thesis. In a companion post, Rauch also noted that v0's two most popular features are the filesystem API and observability tooling, with Vercel doubling down on both — pointing to where agentic workflo…
summary.en: Rauch shared a striking quantitative signal: "Open-weight models ran 29% of gateway tokens, up from 11% in April." In roughly three months, open-weight models nearly tripled their share of inference traffic on the v0 / Vercel AI Gateway — the most concrete real-world data point corroborating today's Nemotron podcast thesis. In a companion post, Rauch also noted that v0's two most popular features are the filesystem API and observability tooling, with Vercel doubling down on both — pointing to where agentic workflo…
summary.zh: Rauch分享了一个显著的量化信号：“开源权重模型消耗了29%的入口令牌，四月为11%。”三个月内，开源权重模型在v0 / Vercel AI Gateway的推理流量中几乎增长三倍，这支持了今日Nemotron播客的论点。在一篇配套文章中，Rauch指出v0的两项最流行功能是文件系统API和可观测性工具，Vercel正加大对两者投入，显示主动工作流的方向。
summary.es: Rauch compartió una señal cuantitativa impactante: "Los modelos de código abierto representaron el 29% de los tokens en el gateway, frente al 11% en abril." En aproximadamente tres meses, los modelos de peso abierto casi triplicaron su participación en el tráfico de inferencia en el v0 / Vercel AI Gateway, lo que corrobora la tesis del podcast Nemotron de hoy. En una publicación complementaria, Rauch también señaló que las dos características más populares de v0 son la API del sistema de archivos y las herramientas de observabilidad, con Vercel duplicando su apuesta en ambas, apuntando al trabajo fluido agentic.

title.original: Aaron Levie · @levie · CEO, Box
title.en: Aaron Levie · @levie · CEO, Box
title.zh: Aaron Levie · @levie · Box首席执行官
title.es: Aaron Levie · @levie · CEO de Box

summary.original: Levie laid out a structural view of the AI landscape: frontier intelligence continues unabated, with top labs perpetually raising the ceiling; smaller, cheaper models absorb "workhorse" tasks while frontier models act as orchestrators. In a companion post, he articulated the central challenge for enterprise private models: "Your most valuable information and insights are not only always changing, but they're often your most sensitive." This frames why static fine-tuning isn't enough — enterprise AI needs continuou…
summary.en: Levie laid out a structural view of the AI landscape: frontier intelligence continues unabated, with top labs perpetually raising the ceiling; smaller, cheaper models absorb "workhorse" tasks while frontier models act as orchestrators. In a companion post, he articulated the central challenge for enterprise private models: "Your most valuable information and insights are not only always changing, but they're often your most sensitive." This frames why static fine-tuning isn't enough — enterprise AI needs continuou…
summary.zh: Levie提出AI格局的结构性观点：前沿智能持续进步，顶尖实验室不断提升上限；小型且廉价模型承担“主力”任务，前沿模型则作为协调者。他在配套帖子中阐述企业私有模型的核心挑战：“最有价值的信息和洞察不断变化，且往往极为敏感。”这说明静态微调不够，企业AI需持续...
summary.es: Levie planteó una visión estructural del panorama de la IA: la inteligencia de frontera sigue sin pausa, con los principales laboratorios elevando continuamente el techo; modelos más pequeños y económicos absorben tareas 'fuerza de trabajo', mientras los de frontera actúan como orquestadores. En una publicación complementaria, articuló el desafío central para modelos privados empresariales: "Tu información y perspectivas más valiosas no solo cambian siempre, sino que suelen ser las más sensibles." Esto justifica por qué el ajuste fino estático no basta, las IA empresariales requieren continua...

title.original: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Design, Cursor AI
title.en: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Design, Cursor AI
title.zh: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Cursor AI设计师
title.es: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Diseño, Cursor AI

summary.original: Ryo built a custom e-reader firmware entirely with Cursor — targeting beautiful CJK and Latin typography with vertical text layout (縱書・禁則), book syncing, and progress tracking on Xteink hardware. The project is technically complex embedded systems work that previously would have required deep C/C++ fluency; Cursor handled most of the implementation. "Hardware hacking is fun!" is the signal: AI coding tools have now expanded the builder identity beyond software into physical systems, and Cursor is the tool of choic…
summary.en: Ryo built a custom e-reader firmware entirely with Cursor — targeting beautiful CJK and Latin typography with vertical text layout (縱書・禁則), book syncing, and progress tracking on Xteink hardware. The project is technically complex embedded systems work that previously would have required deep C/C++ fluency; Cursor handled most of the implementation. "Hardware hacking is fun!" is the signal: AI coding tools have now expanded the builder identity beyond software into physical systems, and Cursor is the tool of choic…
summary.zh: Ryo用Cursor完全构建了一款定制电子阅读器固件，面向优美的中日韩和拉丁文字排版，支持竖排(縱書・禁則)、书籍同步及进度追踪，运行于Xteink硬件。这是技术复杂的嵌入式系统工作，过去需深厚C/C++功底；Cursor承担了大部分实现。“硬件黑客很有趣！”表明AI编码工具已将创造者的身份扩展至物理系统，Cursor成首选工具。
summary.es: Ryo construyó un firmware personalizado para lector electrónico completamente con Cursor, enfocado en tipografía hermosa CJK y latina con disposición vertical (縱書・禁則), sincronización de libros y seguimiento de progreso en hardware Xteink. Este proyecto técnicamente complejo de sistemas embebidos antes requeriría profundo dominio de C/C++; Cursor manejó la mayor parte de la implementación. "¡Hackear hardware es divertido!" es la señal: las herramientas de codificación IA han ampliado la identidad del creador más allá del software hacia sistemas físicos, y Cursor es la herramienta preferida.

title.original: Sam Altman · @sama · CEO, OpenAI
title.en: Sam Altman · @sama · CEO, OpenAI
title.zh: Sam Altman · @sama · OpenAI首席执行官
title.es: Sam Altman · @sama · CEO de OpenAI

summary.original: Altman reacted to what appeared to be a provocative Anthropic post — "i thought this was satire, kept looking for the handle to be spelled c1audeai or something" — garnering 8,294 likes, a rare moment of the OpenAI CEO publicly engaging with a competitor's move. In a separate post he wrote: "still sorta breaks my brain to see our models be good at design finally" — a candid acknowledgment that frontier-quality design capability is genuinely new territory even for GPT. Together the two posts sketch a competitive dy…
summary.en: Altman reacted to what appeared to be a provocative Anthropic post — "i thought this was satire, kept looking for the handle to be spelled c1audeai or something" — garnering 8,294 likes, a rare moment of the OpenAI CEO publicly engaging with a competitor's move. In a separate post he wrote: "still sorta breaks my brain to see our models be good at design finally" — a candid acknowledgment that frontier-quality design capability is genuinely new territory even for GPT. Together the two posts sketch a competitive dy…
summary.zh: Altman对似乎是挑衅性的Anthropic帖子做出反应——“我以为这是讽刺，一直找账户名拼成c1audeai之类”——获得8,294个点赞，这是OpenAI CEO罕见的公开回应竞争对手动作。另有帖子写道：“看到我们的模型终于擅长设计，仍让我有些难以置信”——坦率承认前沿设计能力对GPT来说是真正的新领域。两帖共同勾画了竞争态势。
summary.es: Altman reaccionó a lo que parecía un post provocativo de Anthropic — "pensé que era sátira, buscaba el handle que fuera c1audeai o algo así" — obteniendo 8,294 likes, un raro momento del CEO de OpenAI respondiendo públicamente a un movimiento de un competidor. En otra publicación escribió: "todavía me cuesta creer que nuestros modelos finalmente sean buenos en diseño" — un reconocimiento sincero de que la capacidad de diseño de punta es un territorio nuevo incluso para GPT. Juntas, las dos publicaciones esbozan una dinámica competitiva.

title.original: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’

title.original: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
title.en: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move

title.es: El primer dispositivo de hardware de OpenAI sería un altavoz sin pantalla que puede moverse

summary.original: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."
summary.en: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."
summary.zh: 该设备被奇怪地描述为包含“能够自行移动的机械元件”，彭博社报道称该设备旨在“感觉像伴侣，成为OpenAI ChatGPT的实体体现”。
summary.es: El dispositivo se describe extrañamente como con "elementos mecánicos que pueden moverse solos" y el informe de Bloomberg incluye que está diseñado para "sentirse como un compañero y ser una manifestación física de ChatGPT de OpenAI."

title.original: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
title.en: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
title.zh: OpenAI最新旗舰模型自动删除文件，多人持续警告
title.es: El nuevo modelo estrella de OpenAI elimina archivos por sí solo, advierten usuarios

summary.original: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.
summary.en: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.
summary.zh: 多条社交媒体帖子称GPT-5.6 Sol未经警告删除了文件和数据。OpenAI在六月基本上披露了这一问题。
summary.es: Varios posts en redes sociales afirman que GPT-5.6 Sol eliminó archivos y datos sin aviso. OpenAI había divulgado básicamente el problema en junio.

title.original: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
title.en: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
title.zh: 苹果向所有人开放新版Siri AI，伴随iOS 27公测版
title.es: Apple abre su nuevo Siri AI para todos con la beta pública de iOS 27

summary.original: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.
summary.en: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.
summary.zh: 如果你一直想试用苹果重塑的Siri而不安装开发者版，现在可以了。公司周二发布了iOS 27公测版，让iPhone用户提前体验其AI助手及其他新功能，官方软件将于秋季正式发布。
summary.es: Si has esperado probar el Siri renovado de Apple sin instalar una beta para desarrolladores, ahora puedes. La compañía lanzó el martes la beta pública de iOS 27, dando acceso anticipado a los usuarios de iPhone a su asistente impulsado por IA y otras novedades antes del lanzamiento oficial este otoño.

title.original: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
title.en: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
title.zh: Anthropic最新广告让人感到毛骨悚然
title.es: El último anuncio de Anthropic está inquietando a la gente

summary.original: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.
summary.en: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.
summary.zh: Anthropic一直试图将自己塑造成其他AI公司的道德对照。这个最新的营销噱头，借AI批评来展现Anthropic对自身责任的意识，看起来延续了这一风格。
summary.es: Anthropic ha intentado consistentemente mostrarse como el contrapunto ético frente a otras compañías de IA. Esta última campaña, que aprovecha las críticas a la IA para parecer consciente de su responsabilidad, parece ser más de lo mismo.

summary.es: La colaboración, primera en su tipo para la compañía de inteligencia artificial, utilizará los datos del mercado de predicciones para alimentar algunos resultados de búsqueda sobre el torneo de fútbol.

title.original: China’s StepFun claims it has unveiled the world’s first AI smartphone

title.es: StepFun de China afirma haber presentado el primer teléfono inteligente con IA del mundo

summary.original: As Apple’s latest legal battle with OpenAI complicates the Silicon Valley race to reshape the consumer tech market, one Chinese start-up is taking a leap forward after unveiling what it claims to be the world’s first agentic smartphone. At a launch event in Shanghai on Monday, Tencent Holdings-backed StepFun introduced the StepX Neo. The device runs on Step AOS, an operating system designed specifically for artifici…
summary.en: As Apple’s latest legal battle with OpenAI complicates the Silicon Valley race to reshape the consumer tech market, one Chinese start-up is taking a leap forward after unveiling what it claims to be the world’s first agentic smartphone. At a launch event in Shanghai on Monday, Tencent Holdings-backed StepFun introduced the StepX Neo. The device runs on Step AOS, an operating system designed specifically for artifici…
summary.zh: 在苹果与OpenAI的最新法律斗争复杂化硅谷重塑消费科技市场的竞争之际，一家中国初创企业推出了自称全球首款具有代理能力的智能手机。周一在上海的发布会上，腾讯支持的StepFun发布了StepX Neo，该设备运行专为人工智能设计的Step AOS操作系统。
summary.es: Mientras la última batalla legal de Apple con OpenAI complica la carrera de Silicon Valley para remodelar el mercado tecnológico de consumo, una startup china da un salto adelante tras presentar lo que afirma ser el primer teléfono inteligente agente del mundo. En un evento en Shanghái el lunes, StepFun, respaldada por Tencent Holdings, presentó el StepX Neo. El dispositivo funciona con Step AOS, un sistema operativo diseñado específicamente para la inteligencia artificial…

title.zh: 如何在代理时代管理AI投资

summary.original: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.
summary.en: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

summary.es: Aprenda cómo las empresas pueden gestionar inversiones en IA en la era agenética midiendo el trabajo útil por dólar, mejorando la eficiencia y escalando flujos de trabajo de alto valor.

title.original: PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light
title.en: PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light
title.zh: PsiQuantum计划用光建造大规模量子计算机
title.es: PsiQuantum tiene un plan para crear una computadora cuántica masiva usando luz

summary.original: The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data center crossed with an ice cream factory. Inside will be some 100 stainless-steel cabinets, each about six feet tall and connected to a supply of liquid helium that keeps them only a few degrees above absolute zero.…
summary.en: The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data center crossed with an ice cream factory. Inside will be some 100 stainless-steel cabinets, each about six feet tall and connected to a supply of liquid helium that keeps them only a few degrees above absolute zero.…
summary.zh: 这台可能改变世界的机器将安置在一间既像数据中心又像冰激凌工厂的房间内，内有约100个六英尺高的不锈钢柜，连接液氦供应，将温度维持在接近绝对零度。
summary.es: La máquina que podría cambiar el mundo estará en una sala que parece un centro de datos combinado con una fábrica de helados. Dentro habrá unos 100 gabinetes de acero inoxidable, cada uno de aproximadamente seis pies de altura y conectados a un suministro de helio líquido que los mantiene a pocos grados sobre el cero absoluto…

title.original: Chinese AI labs to challenge Thinking Machines Lab with new industry focus
title.en: Chinese AI labs to challenge Thinking Machines Lab with new industry focus
title.zh: 中国AI实验室聚焦新产业，挑战Thinking Machines Lab
title.es: Laboratorios de IA chinos desafían a Thinking Machines Lab con nuevo enfoque industrial

summary.original: Two former Chinese AI lab leaders said they aim to challenge Thinking Machines Lab, a US start-up founded by ex-OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and focus on building industry-specific artificial intelligence solutions and models following their exit from the fierce frontier AI race. “All models are relentlessly chasing the ceiling of general intelligence … but in many real-world scenarios, we don’t necessarily need an…
summary.en: Two former Chinese AI lab leaders said they aim to challenge Thinking Machines Lab, a US start-up founded by ex-OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and focus on building industry-specific artificial intelligence solutions and models following their exit from the fierce frontier AI race. “All models are relentlessly chasing the ceiling of general intelligence … but in many real-world scenarios, we don’t necessarily need an…
summary.zh: 两位中国前AI实验室领导者表示，退出激烈的前沿AI竞争后，他们将挑战由前OpenAI高管Mira Murati创立的美国初创公司Thinking Machines Lab，专注于构建行业特定的人工智能解决方案和模型。他们认为，“所有模型都一味追求通用智能的极限……但许多实际场景未必需要如此”。
summary.es: Dos exlíderes de laboratorios de IA chinos dijeron que tras salir de la feroz carrera de IA de punta, apuntan a desafiar a Thinking Machines Lab, una startup estadounidense fundada por la exejecutiva de OpenAI Mira Murati, y enfocarse en construir soluciones y modelos de inteligencia artificial específicos para la industria. "Todos los modelos persiguen incansablemente el techo de la inteligencia general... pero en muchos escenarios reales no es estrictamente necesario..."

summary.original: OpenAI's Codex and ChatGPT product lead committed publicly that GPT-5.6 Sol will remain in all paid ChatGPT subscriptions — Plus, Pro, Go, Team, and Edu — and is not being swapped for a weaker model. A follow-up update noted that inference optimizations have landed and cost savings are being passed to subscribers. At 10K+ likes, this was the day's most-engaged OpenAI communication: no nerfing, only better economics. OpenAI 的 Codex 和 ChatGPT 产品负责人公开承诺，GPT-5.6 Sol 将继续包含在所有付费 ChatGPT 订阅中——Plus、Pro、Go、Team 和 Edu——不会被更…
summary.en: OpenAI's Codex and ChatGPT product lead committed publicly that GPT-5.6 Sol will remain in all paid ChatGPT subscriptions — Plus, Pro, Go, Team, and Edu — and is not being swapped for a weaker model. A follow-up update noted that inference optimizations have landed and cost savings are being passed to subscribers. At 10K+ likes, this was the day's most-engaged OpenAI communication: no nerfing, only better economics. OpenAI 的 Codex 和 ChatGPT 产品负责人公开承诺，GPT-5.6 Sol 将继续包含在所有付费 ChatGPT 订阅中——Plus、Pro、Go、Team 和 Edu——不会被更…
summary.zh: OpenAI的Codex和ChatGPT产品负责人公开承诺，GPT-5.6 Sol将继续包含在所有付费ChatGPT订阅中——Plus、Pro、Go、Team和Edu——不会被更弱模型替代。后续更新提到已优化推理并将成本节省转给订阅者。该消息获得超1万点赞，是当天关注度最高的OpenAI通告。
summary.es: El líder de producto de Codex y ChatGPT de OpenAI se comprometió públicamente a que GPT-5.6 Sol seguirá incluido en todas las suscripciones pagas de ChatGPT—Plus, Pro, Go, Team y Edu—y no será reemplazado por un modelo inferior. Una actualización posterior indicó que se implementaron optimizaciones de inferencia y que los ahorros se transfieren a los suscriptores. Con más de 10K likes, fue la comunicación de OpenAI con mayor interacción del día.

summary.original: Altman put out an open community call: share the coolest thing you've built with GPT-5.6 Sol and he'll send the winner a special gift from the OpenAI archives. With 13K+ likes this is a high-visibility signal of confidence in 5.6 Sol as a capable builder platform — and a smart social proof play that will surface real-world use cases directly into the timeline. 奥特曼发出公开社区征集：分享你用 GPT-5.6 Sol 构建的最酷东西，他将向获胜者赠送来自 OpenAI 档案馆的特别礼物。这条帖子获得逾1.3万个点赞，是对 5.6 Sol 作为强大构建平台的高能见度信心信号——也是一次聪明的社会证明举措，将把真实世界用例直接带入信息流。

summary.es: Altman hizo un llamado abierto a la comunidad: comparte la cosa más genial que has construido con GPT-5.6 Sol y enviará al ganador un regalo especial de los archivos de OpenAI. Con más de 13K likes, es una señal visible de confianza en 5.6 Sol como plataforma capaz de construcción y una táctica inteligente de prueba social que mostrará casos de uso reales directamente en el feed.

title.original: Shein executive chairman to step down as IPO nears completion, sources say
title.en: Shein executive chairman to step down as IPO nears completion, sources say
title.zh: 消息称Shein执行董事长将于IPO临近完成时辞职
title.es: El presidente ejecutivo de Shein renunciará cuando se complete la OPI, según fuentes

summary.original: Shein Executive Chairman Donald Tang will step down as his mission of taking the company public nears completion, three sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Monday, retreating to an advisory role after three years as the public face of the global fast-fashion retailer. A Chinese-American billionaire who began his career in banking, Tang has acted as the Western proxy of ‌secretive Shein founder Sky Xu…
summary.en: Shein Executive Chairman Donald Tang will step down as his mission of taking the company public nears completion, three sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Monday, retreating to an advisory role after three years as the public face of the global fast-fashion retailer. A Chinese-American billionaire who began his career in banking, Tang has acted as the Western proxy of ‌secretive Shein founder Sky Xu…
summary.zh: 有三位知情人士周一透露，Shein执行董事长Donald Tang将在带领公司完成上市任务后辞职，转为顾问角色。唐是开始从事银行业的华裔美国亿万富翁，曾是Shein创始人徐威的西方代表。
summary.es: Tres fuentes con conocimiento directo indicaron el lunes que Donald Tang, presidente ejecutivo de Shein, renunciará a medida que se complete la salida a bolsa, pasando a un rol asesor tras tres años como la cara pública de la marca mundial de moda rápida. Tang, un multimillonario chino-estadounidense que comenzó en la banca, ha actuado como representante occidental del reservado fundador de Shein, Sky Xu.

summary.original: Beijing’s recent cybersecurity warning against American artificial intelligence lab Anthropic is expected to accelerate a shift among Chinese developers towards domestic coding alternatives, according to analysts. China’s National Vulnerability Database (NVDB), overseen by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, issued an alert this week claiming multiple versions of Anthropic’s flagship Claude Code too…
summary.en: Beijing’s recent cybersecurity warning against American artificial intelligence lab Anthropic is expected to accelerate a shift among Chinese developers towards domestic coding alternatives, according to analysts. China’s National Vulnerability Database (NVDB), overseen by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, issued an alert this week claiming multiple versions of Anthropic’s flagship Claude Code too…
summary.zh: 分析人士称，北京近期对美国人工智能实验室Anthropic的网络安全警告，预计将加速中国开发者转向国产编码替代品。中国工业和信息化部监管的国家漏洞库本周发出警报，指出Anthropic旗舰产品Claude Code的多个版本存在问题。
summary.es: Según analistas, la reciente advertencia de ciberseguridad en Pekín contra el laboratorio estadounidense de IA Anthropic acelerará el giro de desarrolladores chinos hacia alternativas nacionales. La Base Nacional de Vulnerabilidades de China, supervisada por el Ministerio de Industria y Tecnología de la Información, emitió una alerta esta semana sobre varias versiones del Claude Code de Anthropic.

summary.en: A Chinese chip start-up has launched what it claims to be the world’s first 8-inch production line for two-dimensional (2D) semiconductors, marking the country’s latest push to develop alternative chip technologies amid US curbs on its access to advanced chipmaking equipment. Shanghai-based Yuanjiwei on Thursday unveiled the pilot production line, saying it supports tape-out – or final stage of chip design – and cov…

summary.es: Una startup china de chips lanzó lo que afirma es la primera línea de producción de 8 pulgadas para semiconductores 2D, marcando el último impulso de China para desarrollar tecnologías de chips alternativas en medio de restricciones estadounidenses. summary.en: Online retail giant Shein Global Holdings has secured approval from the China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) to seek an initial public offering in Hong Kong, a long-awaited step for the firm after its attempts to list in New York or London stalled. summary.es: El gigante minorista en línea Shein Global Holdings ha obtenido la aprobación de la Comisión Reguladora de Valores de China (CSRC) para buscar una oferta pública inicial en Hong Kong, un paso largamente esperado tras los intentos fallidos de cotizar en Nueva York o Londres. La empresa planea emitir hasta 341.6 millones de acciones y cotizar en la bolsa de Hong Kong, según un comunicado del viernes de la CSRC.

title.zh: 比尔·盖茨谈与特朗普会面、马斯克的 DOGE 及其童年
title.es: Bill Gates sobre su reunión con Trump, el DOGE de Musk y su infancia

summary.original: The billionaire spoke with The Wall Street Journal ahead of his coming book, “Source Code.”
summary.en: The billionaire spoke with The Wall Street Journal ahead of his coming book, “Source Code.”
summary.zh: 这位亿万富翁在新书《源代码》发布前接受了《华尔街日报》采访。
summary.es: El multimillonario habló con The Wall Street Journal antes del lanzamiento de su próximo libro, “Source Code.”

sections.description: Podcast feeds and audio-first technology briefings.

title.original: How a Writer Uses AI Without Losing His Voice
title.en: How a Writer Uses AI Without Losing His Voice
title.zh: 一位作家如何在不丢失个人风格的情况下使用 AI
title.es: Cómo un escritor usa la IA sin perder su voz

summary.original: The AI & I YouTube episode titled 'How a Writer Uses AI Without Losing His Voice' features Craig Mod, who talks about reducing his newsletter costs from about $7,000 yearly to around $150 by rebuilding the tool himself using AI. The episode explores how writers can incorporate AI into their workflow without sacrificing their personal style, making it a potentially insightful listen for those interested in AI's practical applications in creative work.
summary.en: The AI & I YouTube episode titled 'How a Writer Uses AI Without Losing His Voice' features Craig Mod, who talks about reducing his newsletter costs from about $7,000 yearly to around $150 by rebuilding the tool himself using AI. The episode explores how writers can incorporate AI into their workflow without sacrificing their personal style, making it a potentially insightful listen for those interested in AI's practical applications in creative work.
summary.zh: 在《AI & I》YouTube节目中，Craig Mod分享了他如何利用AI自行重建工具，将通讯费用从约7,000美元降至150美元，探讨了作家如何在保持个人风格的同时融入AI工作流程。
summary.es: El episodio "IA & Yo" presenta a Craig Mod, quien explica cómo redujo los costos de su boletín de unos 7,000 dólares al año a unos 150 usando IA para reconstruir su herramienta, explorando cómo los escritores pueden integrar la IA sin perder su estilo personal.

title.original: How Every's Head of Consulting Uses Codex Every Day
title.en: How Every's Head of Consulting Uses Codex Every Day
title.zh: Every咨询负责人每天如何使用 Codex
title.es: Cómo la jefa de consultoría de Every usa Codex diariamente

summary.original: This episode features Natalia Quintero, head of consulting at Every, discussing how she integrates Codex, an AI tool, into her daily work with executives in hedge funds, private equity, and tech. It explores practical applications of AI in consulting workflows, providing insight into how AI technologies are being used in high-level financial and technology sectors. The discussion is beneficial for listeners interested in the intersection of AI and executive decision-making.
summary.en: This episode features Natalia Quintero, head of consulting at Every, discussing how she integrates Codex, an AI tool, into her daily work with executives in hedge funds, private equity, and tech. It explores practical applications of AI in consulting workflows, providing insight into how AI technologies are being used in high-level financial and technology sectors. The discussion is beneficial for listeners interested in the intersection of AI and executive decision-making.
summary.zh: 本集邀请Every咨询负责人Natalia Quintero，分享她如何将Codex AI工具融入与对冲基金、私募股权和科技高管的日常工作，展示AI在高层金融和科技领域咨询中的实际应用。
summary.es: En este episodio, Natalia Quintero, jefa de consultoría en Every, explica cómo integra Codex, una herramienta de IA, en su trabajo diario con ejecutivos de fondos de cobertura, capital privado y tecnología, mostrando aplicaciones prácticas de IA en consultoría de alto nivel.

title.original: Building a School Where AI Models Learn About Humanity
title.en: Building a School Where AI Models Learn About Humanity
title.zh: 打造一个让AI模型学习人类的学校
title.es: Construyendo una escuela donde los modelos de IA aprenden sobre la humanidad

summary.original: The episode centers on Surge AI CEO Edwin Chen and his perspective on AI's rapid development, particularly around scaling laws that suggest AI may soon surpass human capabilities. It highlights efforts to build an educational environment where AI models learn about humanity, pointing to evolving methods in AI training and ethical considerations. This episode is recommended for listeners curious about the future trajectory of AI and its understanding of human aspects.
summary.en: The episode centers on Surge AI CEO Edwin Chen and his perspective on AI's rapid development, particularly around scaling laws that suggest AI may soon surpass human capabilities. It highlights efforts to build an educational environment where AI models learn about humanity, pointing to evolving methods in AI training and ethical considerations. This episode is recommended for listeners curious about the future trajectory of AI and its understanding of human aspects.
summary.zh: 本集聚焦Surge AI CEO Edwin Chen，探讨AI快速发展的规模定律及其可能超越人类能力的前景，介绍构建让AI模型了解人类的教育环境及AI训练的新方法和伦理考量。
summary.es: El episodio presenta a Edwin Chen, CEO de Surge AI, quien habla sobre el rápido desarrollo de la IA y leyes de escalado que podrían llevar a la IA a superar capacidades humanas, destacando esfuerzos para crear entornos educativos donde los modelos de IA aprendan sobre la humanidad.

title.original: GitHub’s COO Explains Why AI Hasn’t Replaced Developers
title.en: GitHub’s COO Explains Why AI Hasn’t Replaced Developers
title.zh: GitHub首席运营官解析为何AI尚未取代开发者
title.es: El COO de GitHub explica por qué la IA no ha reemplazado a los desarrolladores

summary.original: In this episode, GitHub's COO Kyle Daigle discusses the significant increase in coding activity on GitHub, from 1 billion commits last year to an expected 14 billion this year. He explains why AI has not replaced software developers despite the growth in AI tools, illuminating the current role and future prospects of human developers in the AI age. This conversation is useful for those interested in software development trends and AI's real impact on programming.
summary.en: In this episode, GitHub's COO Kyle Daigle discusses the significant increase in coding activity on GitHub, from 1 billion commits last year to an expected 14 billion this year. He explains why AI has not replaced software developers despite the growth in AI tools, illuminating the current role and future prospects of human developers in the AI age. This conversation is useful for those interested in software development trends and AI's real impact on programming.
summary.zh: GitHub COO Kyle Daigle讨论了GitHub编码活跃度从去年10亿次提交增长到预期今年140亿次的重大增长，解释了AI工具兴起下人类开发者依然不可替代的原因，对软件开发和AI影响感兴趣者有启发意义。
summary.es: Kyle Daigle, COO de GitHub, analiza el aumento de actividad de codificación en GitHub de mil millones de commits el año pasado a 14 mil millones esperados este año, explicando por qué la IA no ha reemplazado a los desarrolladores humanos pese al auge de herramientas de IA.

title.original: Anthropic Expert: Rethink What's Possible With Fable 5
title.en: Anthropic Expert: Rethink What's Possible With Fable 5
title.zh: Anthropic专家：重新思考Fable 5的可能性
title.es: Experto de Anthropic: Replantea lo posible con Fable 5

summary.original: Mike Krieger, cofounder of Instagram and currently working in AI, appears in this episode to discuss Fable 5, an AI system developed by Anthropic. The episode invites listeners to reconsider what is possible with advanced AI systems like Fable 5, suggesting new frontiers in consumer app development powered by AI-native technologies. It provides insights for those interested in innovative AI applications and the evolution of AI in consumer technology.
summary.en: Mike Krieger, cofounder of Instagram and currently working in AI, appears in this episode to discuss Fable 5, an AI system developed by Anthropic. The episode invites listeners to reconsider what is possible with advanced AI systems like Fable 5, suggesting new frontiers in consumer app development powered by AI-native technologies. It provides insights for those interested in innovative AI applications and the evolution of AI in consumer technology.
summary.zh: Instagram联合创始人、现任AI领域工作者Mike Krieger介绍Anthropic开发的AI系统Fable 5，邀请听众重新考虑先进AI系统的潜力，展望AI本地技术驱动的消费者应用新前沿。
summary.es: Mike Krieger, cofundador de Instagram y actualmente en IA, habla sobre Fable 5, un sistema de IA desarrollado por Anthropic, invitando a reconsiderar lo que es posible con sistemas avanzados de IA y explorando nuevas fronteras en aplicaciones consumidoras impulsadas por tecnologías nativas de IA.

title.original: The SaaS Apocalypse Is a Goldmine With Figma’s Matt Colyer
title.en: The SaaS Apocalypse Is a Goldmine With Figma’s Matt Colyer
title.zh: 与Figma的Matt Colyer探讨SaaS末日是金矿
title.es: El Apocalipsis SaaS es una Mina de Oro con Matt Colyer de Figma

summary.original: This episode titled "The SaaS Apocalypse Is a Goldmine With Figma’s Matt Colyer" from the AI & I YouTube channel discusses the phenomenon called the "SaaSpocalypse," which is the concern that AI will render software-as-a-service obsolete. Matt Colyer, the director of product management at Figma, is featured in the discussion. Despite the panic around this topic, the episode suggests that the situation represents a valuable opportunity rather than a crisis. This episode may interest listeners who want to understand AI's impact on SaaS and hear perspectives from a product leader at Figma.
summary.en: This episode titled "The SaaS Apocalypse Is a Goldmine With Figma’s Matt Colyer" from the AI & I YouTube channel discusses the phenomenon called the "SaaSpocalypse," which is the concern that AI will render software-as-a-service obsolete. Matt Colyer, the director of product management at Figma, is featured in the discussion. Despite the panic around this topic, the episode suggests that the situation represents a valuable opportunity rather than a crisis. This episode may interest listeners who want to understand AI's impact on SaaS and hear perspectives from a product leader at Figma.
summary.zh: 本期《AI & I》YouTube频道以“与Figma的Matt Colyer探讨SaaS末日是金矿”为题，讨论了所谓的“SaaSpocalypse”，即担心AI将使软件即服务过时。Figma产品管理总监Matt Colyer参与讨论。尽管围绕这个话题有恐慌，节目指出这其实是一个宝贵的机会而非危机，适合想了解AI对SaaS影响及Figma产品领导者观点的听众。
summary.es: Este episodio titulado "El Apocalipsis SaaS es una Mina de Oro con Matt Colyer de Figma" del canal AI & I en YouTube analiza el fenómeno llamado "SaaSpocalypse", la preocupación de que la IA vuelva obsoleto el software como servicio. Matt Colyer, director de gestión de productos en Figma, participa en la discusión. A pesar del pánico, el episodio sugiere que la situación es una valiosa oportunidad más que una crisis, ideal para quienes desean entender el impacto de la IA en SaaS y conocer perspectivas de un líder de producto en Figma.

title.original: Anthropic's Katelyn Lesse & Angela Jiang: Building an Ecosystem, not a Walled Garden
title.en: Anthropic's Katelyn Lesse & Angela Jiang: Building an Ecosystem, not a Walled Garden
title.zh: Anthropic的Katelyn Lesse与Angela Jiang：构建生态系统而非围墙花园
title.es: Katelyn Lesse y Angela Jiang de Anthropic: Construyendo un Ecosistema, no un Jardín Amurallado

summary.original: In the "Anthropic's Katelyn Lesse & Angela Jiang: Building an Ecosystem, not a Walled Garden" episode from Training Data YouTube, Katelyn Lesse and Angela Jiang discuss their work leading the team that develops Anthropic's developer platform. This platform serves both external builders and Anthropic's own products, focusing on creating an ecosystem rather than a closed environment. The episode may be valuable for those interested in AI development platforms and understanding strategies for ecosystem growth in the AI industry.
summary.en: In the "Anthropic's Katelyn Lesse & Angela Jiang: Building an Ecosystem, not a Walled Garden" episode from Training Data YouTube, Katelyn Lesse and Angela Jiang discuss their work leading the team that develops Anthropic's developer platform. This platform serves both external builders and Anthropic's own products, focusing on creating an ecosystem rather than a closed environment. The episode may be valuable for those interested in AI development platforms and understanding strategies for ecosystem growth in the AI industry.
summary.zh: 在Training Data的这个YouTube节目中，Anthropic的Katelyn Lesse和Angela Jiang讨论了他们领导开发Anthropic开发者平台团队的工作。该平台服务于外部开发者和Anthropic自身产品，侧重于打造生态系统而非封闭环境。此节目适合关注AI开发平台及生态系统增长策略的观众。
summary.es: En el episodio "Katelyn Lesse y Angela Jiang de Anthropic: Construyendo un Ecosistema, no un Jardín Amurallado" del canal Training Data en YouTube, Katelyn Lesse y Angela Jiang hablan sobre su trabajo al frente del equipo que desarrolla la plataforma para desarrolladores de Anthropic. Esta plataforma atiende a constructores externos y a los productos propios de Anthropic, enfocándose en crear un ecosistema en lugar de un entorno cerrado. El episodio es valioso para interesados en plataformas de desarrollo de IA y estrategias de crecimiento de ecosistemas en la industria de IA.

title.original: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.en: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.zh: 任何年龄段提升记忆与认知功能的方法｜艾伦·卡斯特尔博士
title.es: Cómo Mejorar tu Memoria y Función Cognitiva a Cualquier Edad | Dr. Alan Castel

summary.original: This episode titled "How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel" features Dr. Alan Castel, a psychology professor at UCLA recognized as an expert on human memory and cognition. The discussion covers strategies and insights for enhancing memory and cognitive performance regardless of age. Listeners interested in cognitive health and memory improvement may find this episode informative and practical.
summary.en: This episode titled "How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel" features Dr. Alan Castel, a psychology professor at UCLA recognized as an expert on human memory and cognition. The discussion covers strategies and insights for enhancing memory and cognitive performance regardless of age. Listeners interested in cognitive health and memory improvement may find this episode informative and practical.
summary.zh: 本期节目邀请了UCLA心理学教授、记忆与认知专家艾伦·卡斯特尔博士，分享了提升记忆与认知表现的策略与见解，适用于所有年龄段。对认知健康及记忆提升感兴趣者将发现此集内容丰富且实用。
summary.es: Este episodio titulado "Cómo Mejorar tu Memoria y Función Cognitiva a Cualquier Edad | Dr. Alan Castel" presenta al Dr. Alan Castel, profesor de psicología en UCLA y experto en memoria y cognición humana. La charla aborda estrategias y conocimientos para mejorar la memoria y el rendimiento cognitivo a cualquier edad. Es informativo y práctico para quienes se interesan en la salud cognitiva y la mejora de la memoria.

title.original: The AI Memory Problem: Why Long Context Isn’t Enough — Dan Biderman, Engram Co-founder & CEO
title.en: The AI Memory Problem: Why Long Context Isn’t Enough — Dan Biderman, Engram Co-founder & CEO
title.zh: 人工智能的记忆难题：为何长上下文仍不足——Engram联合创始人兼CEO Dan Biderman
title.es: El Problema de la Memoria en IA: Por Qué el Contexto Largo No Es Suficiente — Dan Biderman, Cofundador y CEO de Engram

summary.original: In "The AI Memory Problem: Why Long Context Isn’t Enough," Dan Biderman, co-founder and CEO of Engram, joins the Latent Space YouTube channel for a conversation. The episode explores the challenges AI faces with memory and the limitations of relying solely on extended context windows. The discussion offers insights into building AI systems that address memory more effectively. This episode may appeal to those curious about cutting-edge AI development and memory-related problems in AI.
summary.en: In "The AI Memory Problem: Why Long Context Isn’t Enough," Dan Biderman, co-founder and CEO of Engram, joins the Latent Space YouTube channel for a conversation. The episode explores the challenges AI faces with memory and the limitations of relying solely on extended context windows. The discussion offers insights into building AI systems that address memory more effectively. This episode may appeal to those curious about cutting-edge AI development and memory-related problems in AI.
summary.zh: 《人工智能的记忆难题：为何长上下文仍不足》一集请来Engram联合创始人兼CEO Dan Biderman，探讨AI在记忆方面面临的挑战以及依赖延长上下文窗口的局限性。讨论深入构建更有效记忆的AI系统，适合对前沿AI开发及记忆问题感兴趣的听众。
summary.es: En "El Problema de la Memoria en IA: Por Qué el Contexto Largo No Es Suficiente", Dan Biderman, cofundador y CEO de Engram, participa en el canal Latent Space para conversar sobre los desafíos que enfrenta la IA con la memoria y las limitaciones de confiar solo en contextos extensos. La discusión ofrece ideas sobre la construcción de sistemas de IA con una mejor gestión de la memoria, ideal para quienes sienten curiosidad por el desarrollo avanzado de IA y problemas relacionados con la memoria.

title.original: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.en: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.zh: 如何在任何年龄提升记忆与认知功能 | Dr. Alan Castel
title.es: Cómo mejorar la memoria y función cognitiva a cualquier edad | Dr. Alan Castel

summary.original: This Huberman Lab podcast episode features Dr. Alan Castel, a UCLA psychology professor and expert on human memory and cognitive aging. The discussion delves into how to improve learning ability and memory at any age, explaining memory function, false memories, and strategies like curiosity and self-testing to strengthen memory. It also explores traits of "superagers" who improve cognitive capacity with age. The episode offers comprehensive scientific insights and practical tools for maintaining cognitive function across the lifespan.
summary.en: This Huberman Lab podcast episode features Dr. Alan Castel, a UCLA psychology professor and expert on human memory and cognitive aging. The discussion delves into how to improve learning ability and memory at any age, explaining memory function, false memories, and strategies like curiosity and self-testing to strengthen memory. It also explores traits of "superagers" who improve cognitive capacity with age. The episode offers comprehensive scientific insights and practical tools for maintaining cognitive function across the lifespan.
summary.zh: Huberman Lab播客邀请UCLA心理学教授Alan Castel博士，探讨如何在任何年龄提升学习能力与记忆，解析假记忆、好奇心与自我测试等记忆强化策略，并介绍“超级老人”认知能力提升特征，提供科学洞见与实用工具。
summary.es: El episodio del podcast Huberman Lab presenta al Dr. Alan Castel, profesor de psicología en UCLA y experto en memoria y envejecimiento, quien analiza cómo mejorar el aprendizaje y la memoria a cualquier edad, explicando funciones de la memoria, falsos recuerdos, estrategias como la curiosidad y autoevaluación para fortalecerla, además de características de los "superagers" que mejoran la capacidad cognitiva.

title.original: #399 ‒ The evolution of Alzheimer's disease and dementia care: how early detection, personalized treatment, new therapies, and a multimodal approach are changing the landscape | Gayatri Devi, M.D.
title.en: #399 ‒ The evolution of Alzheimer's disease and dementia care: how early detection, personalized treatment, new therapies, and a multimodal approach are changing the landscape | Gayatri Devi, M.D.
title.zh: 阿尔茨海默病与痴呆护理的演变：早期检测、个性化治疗、新疗法及多模式策略改变格局 | Gayatri Devi医生
title.es: La evolución del cuidado del Alzheimer y demencia: detección precoz, tratamiento personalizado, nuevas terapias y enfoque multimodal que cambian el panorama | Dra. Gayatri Devi

summary.original: In this episode of The Peter Attia Drive, Gayatri Devi, a neurologist specializing in memory disorders including Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, discusses how dementia is viewed as a spectrum and the advances in personalized treatment. Gayatri explains biomarkers, early detection, anti-amyloid therapies, and explores the role of menopause and cognition. She also covers a multimodal approach to treatment and the future role of AI and precision medicine in dementia care. The episode provides an in-depth look at evolving approaches to Alzheimer's and dementia care.
summary.en: In this episode of The Peter Attia Drive, Gayatri Devi, a neurologist specializing in memory disorders including Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, discusses how dementia is viewed as a spectrum and the advances in personalized treatment. Gayatri explains biomarkers, early detection, anti-amyloid therapies, and explores the role of menopause and cognition. She also covers a multimodal approach to treatment and the future role of AI and precision medicine in dementia care. The episode provides an in-depth look at evolving approaches to Alzheimer's and dementia care.
summary.zh: Peter Attia Drive节目邀请神经科专家Gayatri Devi医生，讨论痴呆作为连续体的观点、个性化治疗进展、生物标志物、早期检测、抗淀粉样蛋白疗法及更年期与认知关联，介绍多模式治疗方法及未来AI与精准医疗在痴呆护理中的作用，深入解析阿尔茨海默病护理新趋势。
summary.es: En este episodio de The Peter Attia Drive, la neuróloga Gayatri Devi, especialista en trastornos de la memoria como Alzheimer y demencias, aborda la demencia como un espectro, avances en tratamientos personalizados, biomarcadores, detección temprana, terapias anti-amiloides y el papel de la menopausia en la cognición. También explora un enfoque multimodal y el futuro de la IA y la medicina de precisión en el cuidado de demencias, ofreciendo una mirada profunda a las tendencias cambiantes en el cuidado del Alzheimer.

title.original: Why the tech workforce is quietly splitting in two | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.en: Why the tech workforce is quietly splitting in two | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.zh: 科技人力为何静悄悄地分裂成两派｜年度AI情感调查（Noam Segal）
title.es: Por Qué la Fuerza Laboral Tecnológica se Está Dividiendo en Dos en Silencio | Encuesta Anual sobre Sentimiento en IA (Noam Segal)

summary.original: This episode of Lenny's Podcast features Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at Airbnb, Meta, Twitter, Zapier, Intercom, and Figma, who co-runs the annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey. The conversation explores how the tech workforce is quietly splitting into two groups in response to AI developments. Listeners can learn about the emotional archetypes among tech workers, rising burnout levels, and the changing dynamics in tech careers.
summary.en: This episode of Lenny's Podcast features Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at Airbnb, Meta, Twitter, Zapier, Intercom, and Figma, who co-runs the annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey. The conversation explores how the tech workforce is quietly splitting into two groups in response to AI developments. Listeners can learn about the emotional archetypes among tech workers, rising burnout levels, and the changing dynamics in tech careers.
summary.zh: 本集《Lenny's Podcast》邀请Noam Segal——曾在Airbnb、Meta等多家公司任职的研究负责人及年度科技工作者情感调查共同主持人，探讨科技人力因AI发展而静悄悄地分裂成两派的现象。内容涵盖情感类型、工作倦怠上升及职业动态变化，适合关注科技行业动态的听众。
summary.es: Este episodio del podcast de Lenny presenta a Noam Segal, líder de investigación con experiencia en Airbnb, Meta, entre otros, y coorganizador de la Encuesta Anual de Sentimiento de Trabajadores Tecnológicos. La conversación explora cómo la fuerza laboral tecnológica se está dividiendo silenciosamente en dos grupos ante los avances en IA, abarcando arquetipos emocionales, aumento del agotamiento y cambios en la dinámica profesional, ideal para quienes siguen la industria tecnológica.

title.original: How tech workers actually feel about AI in 2026 | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.en: How tech workers actually feel about AI in 2026 | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.zh: 2026年科技工作者对人工智能的真实感受｜年度AI情感调查（Noam Segal）
title.es: Cómo se Sienten Realmente los Trabajadores Tecnológicos Sobre la IA en 2026 | Encuesta Anual sobre Sentimiento en IA (Noam Segal)

summary.original: In this detailed episode of Lenny's Podcast, Noam Segal discusses results from the second annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey, which gathers quantitative data on tech workers' feelings about AI, burnout, and their careers. The episode covers the workforce split caused by AI, four emotional archetypes of tech workers, a significant rise in burnout, and fears within the industry. It provides concrete advice for employees and leaders navigating these challenges.
summary.en: In this detailed episode of Lenny's Podcast, Noam Segal discusses results from the second annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey, which gathers quantitative data on tech workers' feelings about AI, burnout, and their careers. The episode covers the workforce split caused by AI, four emotional archetypes of tech workers, a significant rise in burnout, and fears within the industry. It provides concrete advice for employees and leaders navigating these challenges.
summary.zh: 本期《Lenny's Podcast》详细探讨了第二届年度科技工作者情感调查结果，主持人Noam Segal分享了科技工人对AI、倦怠及职业感受的量化数据。内容涉及因AI引发的人力分裂、四种情感类型、严重增长的倦怠感和行业恐惧，并提供应对建议，适合员工及领导者收听。
summary.es: En este detallado episodio de Lenny's Podcast, Noam Segal discute los resultados de la segunda Encuesta Anual de Sentimiento de Trabajadores Tecnológicos, que recopila datos cuantitativos sobre las emociones de los trabajadores frente a la IA, el agotamiento y sus carreras. Cubre la división laboral causada por la IA, cuatro arquetipos emocionales, un aumento significativo del agotamiento y miedos en la industria, ofreciendo consejos concretos para empleados y líderes enfrentando estos desafíos.

title.original: AI Is Quietly Making Us Less Capable — Danielle Perszyk, Amazon AGI Lab
title.en: AI Is Quietly Making Us Less Capable — Danielle Perszyk, Amazon AGI Lab
title.zh: 人工智能正悄然削弱我们的能力 —— Danielle Perszyk，亚马逊AGI实验室
title.es: La IA nos está haciendo menos capaces en silencio — Danielle Perszyk, Laboratorio AGI de Amazon

summary.original: This episode from Latent Space features Danielle Perszyk from Amazon's AGI Lab discussing cognitive science-inspired research related to AI. The title and description suggest a focus on how AI agents do not fully understand human users and how AI might be quietly causing a decline in human capability. The episode may appeal to listeners interested in the intersection of AI, cognitive science, and the nuanced impacts of AI on human cognition.
summary.en: This episode from Latent Space features Danielle Perszyk from Amazon's AGI Lab discussing cognitive science-inspired research related to AI. summary.zh: 本期Latent Space节目邀请亚马逊AGI实验室的Danielle Perszyk，探讨受到认知科学启发的AI研究，重点讨论AI对人类认知能力的潜在影响。适合对AI与认知科学交叉及其对人类认知微妙影响感兴趣的听众。
summary.es: Este episodio de Latent Space presenta a Danielle Perszyk del laboratorio AGI de Amazon, quien discute investigaciones inspiradas en la ciencia cognitiva sobre IA, enfocándose en cómo los agentes de IA pueden disminuir silenciosamente la capacidad humana. Interesante para oyentes interesados en la intersección de IA, ciencia cognitiva y sus impactos en la cognición humana.

title.original: Adam Brown – A deep but accessible introduction to general relativity
title.en: Adam Brown – A deep but accessible introduction to general relativity
title.zh: Adam Brown——对广义相对论的深入而易懂介绍
title.es: Adam Brown – Una introducción profunda pero accesible a la relatividad general

summary.original: This episode features Adam Brown explaining general relativity in an accessible way. Adam previously taught a comprehensive 20-lecture graduate course at Stanford on the topic and now distills its central idea and Einstein's "happiest thought" clearly for a general audience. The conversation covers why black holes are considered ultimate power plants and explores differences in observation between distant and infalling observers around black holes. Adam now leads BlueShift at Google DeepMind, a team focused on science and reasoning. The episode also touches briefly on AI's potential to rediscover general relativity, offering a mix of physics insight and scientific philosophy.
summary.en: This episode features Adam Brown explaining general relativity in an accessible way. Adam previously taught a comprehensive 20-lecture graduate course at Stanford on the topic and now distills its central idea and Einstein's "happiest thought" clearly for a general audience. The conversation covers why black holes are considered ultimate power plants and explores differences in observation between distant and infalling observers around black holes. Adam now leads BlueShift at Google DeepMind, a team focused on science and reasoning. The episode also touches briefly on AI's potential to rediscover general relativity, offering a mix of physics insight and scientific philosophy.
summary.zh: 此节目Adam Brown以通俗方式讲解广义相对论。他曾在斯坦福开设20讲毕业课程，现为Google DeepMind BlueShift团队负责人，专注科学与推理。内容涵盖黑洞为何为终极能量源及不同观察者的视角差异，亦简述AI重现广义相对论的潜力，融合物理洞见与科学哲学。
summary.es: Este episodio presenta a Adam Brown explicando la relatividad general de forma accesible. Anteriormente dictó un curso de posgrado de 20 conferencias en Stanford y ahora lidera BlueShift en Google DeepMind, enfocado en ciencia y razonamiento. La charla cubre por qué los agujeros negros son las centrales energéticas definitivas y diferencias de observación entre observadores distantes e inyectados, además del posible papel de la IA para redescubrir la relatividad general, mezclando física y filosofía científica.

title.original: Adam Mosseri: AI is a tailwind for authenticity

El episodio profundiza en desafíos y lecciones durante su liderazgo, incluyendo reflexiones sobre fracasos de producto, ofreciendo valiosas perspectivas sobre desarrollo de producto e influencia de la IA en redes sociales e identidad del creador.

title.original: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD)
title.en: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD)
title.zh: 必听：强迫症（OCD）的科学与治疗
title.es: Esenciales: La ciencia y tratamiento del Trastorno Obsesivo Compulsivo (TOC)

summary.original: This Huberman Lab Essentials episode focuses on the biology and psychology of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), explaining the neural circuitry behind repetitive thought-action loops. It discusses why compulsive actions can strengthen obsessions instead of relieving them. The episode covers effective treatments for OCD such as exposure-based cognitive behavioral therapy and SSRIs, including how they compare alone and combined. It also describes a clinical protocol where patients learn to suppress compulsive responses by entering anxiety states, aiming to retrain the brain and break the OCD cycle. The episode includes insights from Dr. Helen Blair Simpson, an expert on OCD.
summary.en: This Huberman Lab Essentials episode focuses on the biology and psychology of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), explaining the neural circuitry behind repetitive thought-action loops. It discusses why compulsive actions can strengthen obsessions instead of relieving them. The episode covers effective treatments for OCD such as exposure-based cognitive behavioral therapy and SSRIs, including how they compare alone and combined. It also describes a clinical protocol where patients learn to suppress compulsive responses by entering anxiety states, aiming to retrain the brain and break the OCD cycle. The episode includes insights from Dr. Helen Blair Simpson, an expert on OCD.
summary.zh: Huberman Lab必听节目聚焦强迫症的生物学和心理学，解释神经回路如何导致重复的思维和行为循环。讨论强迫行为为何加剧执念而非缓解症状。介绍了暴露认知行为疗法和选择性5-羟色胺再摄取抑制剂（SSRIs）等有效治疗方法及其单独和联合应用。描述临床方案中患者通过进入焦虑状态抑制强迫反应，重新训练大脑打破强迫循环。本集包含OCD专家Helen Blair Simpson博士的见解。
summary.es: Este episodio esencial de Huberman Lab se centra en la biología y psicología del trastorno obsesivo-compulsivo (TOC), explicando la circuitería neuronal detrás de los ciclos repetitivos de pensamiento y acción. Discute por qué las compulsiones pueden reforzar las obsesiones en lugar de aliviarlas. Cubre tratamientos efectivos como la terapia cognitivo-conductual basada en la exposición y los ISRS, incluyendo comparaciones de uso individual y combinado. Describe un protocolo clínico donde los pacientes aprenden a suprimir respuestas compulsivas entrando en estados de ansiedad, buscando reentrenar el cerebro y romper el ciclo del TOC. Incluye perspectivas de la experta en TOC, la Dra. Helen Blair Simpson.

title.original: The AI Infra Stack: DeFlash, Auto Endpoints, RDMA, and Sandboxes — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
title.en: The AI Infra Stack: DeFlash, Auto Endpoints, RDMA, and Sandboxes — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
title.zh: AI基础设施堆栈：DeFlash，自动端点，RDMA和沙箱 — Akshat Bubna，Modal首席技术官
title.es: La pila de infraestructura de IA: DeFlash, puntos finales automáticos, RDMA y sandboxes — Akshat Bubna, CTO de Modal

summary.original: This episode of Latent Space features Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO, discussing the AI infrastructure stack. Topics include adding GPUs before ChatGPT's release, building cloud primitives for elastic inference, agent sandboxes, post-training, and production AI workloads. It covers technical challenges such as the '100,000 Sandbox Problem' and innovations supporting AI deployment at scale. This conversation offers valuable insights into foundational AI infrastructure development.
summary.en: This episode of Latent Space features Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO, discussing the AI infrastructure stack. Topics include adding GPUs before ChatGPT's release, building cloud primitives for elastic inference, agent sandboxes, post-training, and production AI workloads. It covers technical challenges such as the '100,000 Sandbox Problem' and innovations supporting AI deployment at scale. This conversation offers valuable insights into foundational AI infrastructure development.
summary.zh: 本期《Latent Space》采访了Modal CTO Akshat Bubna，讨论AI基础设施堆栈，包括ChatGPT发布前的GPU添加、弹性推理的云基础、代理沙箱、后训练及生产AI工作负载，涉及“10万沙箱问题”等技术挑战和支持大规模AI部署的创新，提供基础AI基础设施开发的深刻见解。
summary.es: Este episodio de Latent Space presenta a Akshat Bubna, CTO de Modal, quien habla sobre la pila de infraestructura de IA. Aborda temas como la incorporación de GPUs antes del lanzamiento de ChatGPT, la construcción de primitivas en la nube para inferencia elástica, sandboxes de agentes, post-entrenamiento y cargas de trabajo de IA en producción. Cubre desafíos técnicos como el "problema de los 100,000 sandboxes" e innovaciones que soportan el despliegue masivo de IA, ofreciendo valiosas perspectivas sobre el desarrollo de infraestructura IA fundamental.

title.original: Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
title.en: Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
title.zh: 为何AI基础设施必须为代理体验进化 — Akshat Bubna，Modal首席技术官
title.es: Por qué la infraestructura de IA debe evolucionar para la experiencia de agentes — Akshat Bubna, CTO de Modal

summary.original: In this Latent Space podcast episode, Modal CTO Akshat Bubna discusses why AI infrastructure must evolve to support agent experiences. The episode covers Modal's growth and its focus shift from developer experience to agent experience, emphasizing challenges with traditional cloud infrastructure in handling bursty, compute-heavy AI workloads. Topics include the need for sandboxes, elastic inference, GPU snapshotting, and other innovations enabling AI agents to operate efficiently. The discussion also touches on Modal's strategy across multiple cloud providers and the technological complexity behind modern AI infrastructure.
summary.en: In this Latent Space podcast episode, Modal CTO Akshat Bubna discusses why AI infrastructure must evolve to support agent experiences. The episode covers Modal's growth and its focus shift from developer experience to agent experience, emphasizing challenges with traditional cloud infrastructure in handling bursty, compute-heavy AI workloads. Topics include the need for sandboxes, elastic inference, GPU snapshotting, and other innovations enabling AI agents to operate efficiently. The discussion also touches on Modal's strategy across multiple cloud providers and the technological complexity behind modern AI infrastructure.
summary.zh: 本期Latent Space播客中，Modal CTO Akshat Bubna探讨AI基础设施为何需要进化以支持代理体验。内容涵盖Modal的成长及其重点从开发者体验转向代理体验，强调传统云基础设施在处理突发且计算密集的AI工作负载时的挑战，及沙箱、弹性推理、GPU快照等创新。还讨论了Modal在多云环境下的战略及现代AI基础设施背后的技术复杂性。
summary.es: En este episodio del podcast Latent Space, Akshat Bubna, CTO de Modal, explica por qué la infraestructura de IA debe evolucionar para apoyar la experiencia de agentes. Se aborda el crecimiento de Modal y su cambio de enfoque de la experiencia del desarrollador a la del agente, destacando los retos de la infraestructura cloud tradicional ante cargas de trabajo de IA intensivas y erráticas, así como innovaciones como sandboxes, inferencia elástica y snapshots de GPU. También se discuten las estrategias de Modal en múltiples proveedores cloud y la complejidad tecnológica detrás de la infraestructura moderna de IA.

summary.en: The Training Data podcast episode explores Zipline's autonomous system, highlighting its achievement of flying 140 million autonomous miles without any safety incidents. summary.es: El episodio del podcast Training Data explora el sistema autónomo de Zipline, destacando su logro de volar 140 millones de millas autónomas sin incidentes de seguridad. Se describe como el sistema autónomo comercial más grande, no una flota de robotaxis. Este episodio es relevante para quienes se interesan en sistemas autónomos a gran escala y la seguridad en operaciones autónomas.
